user.title: Mira Mode Setup
user.description: Select a discovered Mira Mode device, or enter a BLE address manually.

bluetooth_confirm.title: Mira Mode Discovered
bluetooth_confirm.description: A Mira Mode device was discovered: **{name}** ({address}). Would you like to set it up?

pair.title: Pair with {name}
pair.description:
To pair with **{name}** ({address}):

1. **Hold the outlet button on the shower unit for 5 seconds** to enter pairing mode.
2. The LED should start flashing.
3. Press **Submit** below to send the pairing command.

Make sure you are within Bluetooth range (or have an ESPHome BLE proxy nearby).

error.pairing_failed: Pairing failed. Make sure the device is in pairing mode (hold outlet button for 5 seconds) and try again.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the logs for details.

init.title: Mira Mode Options
init.description: Tune polling behaviour for this device.

data_description.update_interval: How often to query the shower over BLE. Larger values reduce log noise on flaky links; smaller values give faster state updates. Range: 10-600 seconds.
